inputs.label: Annual Interest Rate
inputs.businessContext: The nominal annual interest rate, before compounding effect.

businessContext_i18n.en: The nominal annual interest rate, before compounding effect.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Bileşik etkiden önceki yıllık nominal faiz oranı.
businessContext_i18n.de: Der nominale jährliche Zinssatz vor Zinseszinseffekt.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Le taux d'intérêt nominal annuel, avant effet de composition.

inputs.label: Compounding Frequency
inputs.businessContext: Number of compounding periods per year (e.g., 1 for annual, 12 for monthly).

businessContext_i18n.en: Number of compounding periods per year (e.g., 1 for annual, 12 for monthly).
businessContext_i18n.tr: Yıllık bileşik dönem sayısı (ör. yıllık için 1, aylık için 12).
businessContext_i18n.de: Anzahl der Zinseszinsperioden pro Jahr (z. B. 1 für jährlich, 12 für monatlich).
businessContext_i18n.fr: Nombre de périodes de composition par an (ex. 1 pour annuel, 12 pour mensuel).

inputs.label: Rule Constant
inputs.businessContext: The constant used in the rule of 72 (typically 72, but can be 70 or 69.3 for more precision).

businessContext_i18n.en: The constant used in the rule of 72 (typically 72, but can be 70 or 69.3 for more precision).
businessContext_i18n.tr: 72 kuralında kullanılan sabit (genelde 72, daha hassas için 70 veya 69.3).
businessContext_i18n.de: Die Konstante der 72er-Regel (üblich 72, aber 70 oder 69,3 für höhere Genauigkeit).
businessContext_i18n.fr: La constante utilisée dans la règle de 72 (généralement 72, mais peut être 70 ou 69,3 pour plus de précision).

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
